title: The Spacious Mind
text: Home * People * The Spacious Mind Spacious Mind , pseudonym of Nick Milicev [1] , a computer chess aficionado and collector of dedicated chess computers as well as chess programs for home- and personal computers . He maintains The Spacious Mind sites [2] with a lot of informations about chess computers and programs, referred from multiple CPW sites on these topics.
